div1.entryFree: Unwashed, not washed, unclean: another lean u. artificer, John IV, 2, 201. rob me the exchequer the first thing thou doest, and do it with u. hands too, H4A III, 3, 206 (without staying to wash your hands). when good manners shall lie all in one or two men's hands and they u. too, 'tis a foul thing, Rom. I, 5, 5.
